description: black to kill white and take the corner without ko.
sgf:
(;
AW [ba][cb][bc][cc][dc][ed][gd][ee][fe][bf][cf][df]
AB [ca][da][bb][db][fb][ec][fc][gc][bd][dd][fd][be][de]
C [black to kill white and take the corner.]
     (;B[ab] ;W[ac]
          (;B[cd] ;W[aa]
               (;B[bb] ;W[ae] ;B[ab] C[RIGHT black wins.])
               (;B[ab]; W[ae] ;B[bb] C[RIGHT black wins.])
          )
          (;B[ad] ;W[aa]
               (;B[cd] ;W[ce] C[white wins.])
               (;B[bb] ;W[ce] C[white wins.])
          )
          (;B[ae] ;W[af] C[white wins.])
          (;B[aa] ;W[ba] C[white wins.])
     )

     (;B[cd] ;W[ab] C[oops!])
     (;B[ac] ;W[ab]
          (;B[ae] ;W[af]
               (;B[cd] ;W[ad] C[ko. black can do better.])
               (;B[ad] ;W[gf] C[white tenuki. white wins.])
               (;B[ce] ;W[gf] C[white tenuki. white wins.])
          )
          (;B[ad] ;W[ce] C[white wins.])
          (;B[cd] ;W[ad] C[white wins.])
     )
     (;B[aa] ;W[ac]
          (;B[cd] ;W[ae] C[white wins.])
          (;B[ae] ;W[af] C[white wins.])
          (;B[ad] ;W[ce] C[white wins.])
     )
     (;B[ae] ;W[ac]
          (;B[aa] ;W[gf] C[white tenuki. white wins.])
          (;B[ab]
               (;W[af] C[CHOICE]
                    (;B[cd] ;W[aa] ;B[bb] ;W[ab] C[white wins.])
                    (;B[aa] ;W[ba] C[white wins.])
               )
               (;W[aa] C[CHOICE]
                    (;B[cd] ;W[af] ;B[bb] ;W[ab] C[white wins.])
                    (;B[bb] ;W[ab] C[white wins.])
                    (;B[af] ;W[bg] C[white wins.])
               )
          )
          (;B[cd] ;W[ab] C[oops!])
     )
     (;B[ad] ;W[ac] ;B[ab] ;W[aa] ;B[bb] ;W[ce] C[white wins.])

)
